pulse_items.title: Artemis II Crew Returns to Earth Safely
pulse_items.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully concluded with splashdown in the Pacific Ocean. The four astronauts are being recovered by the USS John C. Stennis, with live images going viral across social media. This marks humanity's return to lunar orbit after decades.

pulse_items.title: Pragmata Pre-Load Breaks Steam Records
pulse_items.summary: Capcom's highly anticipated sci-fi game Pragmata has shattered pre-load records on Steam, with over 2 million downloads in 24 hours. Reddit's gaming community is exploding with speculation about the mysterious storyline and next-gen graphics.

pulse_items.title: Microsoft Unveils Agentic AI Platform at Azure Summit
pulse_items.summary: Microsoft announced its new Agentic AI framework at the Azure Summit, enabling autonomous AI agents that can complete complex multi-step tasks. The system demonstrates significant advances in reasoning and planning capabilities beyond current models.

pulse_items.title: TikTok's 'Quantum Dance' Trend Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: A new dance trend called 'Quantum Dance' has taken over TikTok, featuring glitchy, multi-dimensional movements that creators claim represent quantum superposition. The #QuantumDance hashtag has 500M+ views and is spreading to Instagram Reels.

pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'Chrono-Cops' Breaks Viewing Records
pulse_items.summary: Netflix's new time-travel police procedural 'Chrono-Cops' has become the most-watched series premiere in platform history. The show's unique premise of policing time crimes has sparked intense discussion about temporal paradoxes.

pulse_items.title: MLB's Robotic Umpire System Causes Controversy
pulse_items.summary: Major League Baseball's new fully automated strike zone system has sparked controversy after several questionable calls in today's games. Players and fans are divided on the technology's accuracy and impact on the game's human element.

pulse_items.title: 'AI-Generated Grandma Recipes' Meme Explodes
pulse_items.summary: A hilarious meme format where people share absurd AI-generated 'grandma recipes' (like 'quantum chicken soup' or '5D lasagna') is being DM-shared across platforms. The trend highlights both AI's creativity and its culinary limitations.

pulse_items.title: Breakthrough in Room-Temperature Superconductivity
pulse_items.summary: Researchers at MIT have announced a new material that demonstrates superconductivity at 25°C, potentially revolutionizing energy transmission and quantum computing. The paper is trending across scientific communities with cautious optimism.

pulse_items.title: Taylor Swift Announces 'Eras Tour: Hologram Edition'
pulse_items.summary: Taylor Swift revealed she'll be performing simultaneous concerts in 10 cities using advanced hologram technology. The announcement has crashed Ticketmaster servers and sparked debates about the future of live entertainment.

pulse_items.title: Discord's 'Retro Gaming Archaeology' Community Booms
pulse_items.summary: A niche Discord community dedicated to preserving and reverse-engineering lost retro games from the 80s and 90s has exploded to 50K+ members. They're currently focused on recovering a lost Sega Saturn prototype.

pulse_items.title: Google Searches Spike for 'How to Detox from AI Overload'
pulse_items.summary: Google Trends shows a 300% spike in searches for 'digital detox' and 'AI overload' as people report feeling overwhelmed by constant AI interactions. The trend reflects growing concerns about human-AI balance.

pulse_items.title: YouTube's 'Cooking with Quantum Physics' Series Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: A physicist's YouTube series explaining quantum mechanics through cooking metaphors has gained 5M+ views in a week. The creator uses kitchen experiments to demonstrate superposition, entanglement, and quantum tunneling concepts.

pulse_items.title: Major Solar Storm Expected to Hit Earth Tomorrow
pulse_items.summary: NASA and NOAA have issued a G3 (Strong) geomagnetic storm watch for April 12, potentially affecting power grids and satellite operations. The storm could also create spectacular auroras visible at unusually low latitudes.

pulse_items.title: 'Silent Disco Hiking' Becomes Unexpected Wellness Trend
pulse_items.summary: Groups are organizing 'silent disco hikes' where participants wear wireless headphones and dance while hiking trails. The trend combines exercise, music, and social connection while maintaining trail etiquette.

pulse_items.title: EU Announces Comprehensive AI Liability Framework
pulse_items.summary: The European Union has unveiled a groundbreaking AI liability directive that establishes clear rules for when AI systems cause harm. The framework is trending among legal and tech professionals as a potential global standard.
